Heritage World Coin Auctions - NYINC Signature Sale 3129, Lot 33061 — Ancients
PTOLEMAIC KINGDOM. Ptolemy I Soter (305/304-282 BC). AV stater (18mm, 7.11 gm, 12h). NGC Choice AU★ 5/5 - 4/5. Lifetime issue under Magas, Cyrene, ca. 299-294 BC, Hippocr-, magistrate. Diadem
sales.description:
Ancients
PTOLEMAIC KINGDOM. Ptolemy I Soter (305/304-282 BC). AV stater (18mm, 7.11 gm, 12h). NGC Choice AU★ 5/5 - 4/5. Lifetime issue under Magas, Cyrene, ca. 299-294 BC, Hippocr-, magistrate. Diademed head of Ptolemy I right, aegis tied around neck / ΠTOΛEMAIOY / BAΣIΛEΩΣ, the deified Alexander the Great standing left in military dress, thunderbolt in right hand, reins and Macedonian shield in left, in elephant quadriga left; ΙΠΠΟΚΡ monogram in exergue. CPE 271. Svoronos 102 and Plate IV, 3....
